kilimani-premium-towers.name: Kilimani Premium Towers
kilimani-premium-towers.location: Nairobi, Kenya. Grade-A Expat Residential Complex.
opportunity: The Kilimani submarket sits at the intersection of diplomatic, NGO, and multinational demand in Nairobi — a structural shortage of Grade-A expatriate housing has compressed vacancy to under 4% while rental indices continue to outpace inflation.

Premium Towers is positioned as a fully serviced, 18-storey residential complex with concierge, backup power, and on-site amenities — the precise specification that institutional tenants underwrite at a premium. Pre-leasing intent has been secured from three multinational anchors prior to completion.

unity-homes-precinct.name: Unity Homes Precinct
opportunity: Unity Homes is the largest EDGE-certified residential precinct in East Africa, addressing the structural shortfall in middle-income housing within the Nairobi Capital District.
The precinct operates on a build-to-rent model with sale-and-leaseback structuring, providing institutional investors with predictable, indexed cashflows backed by a curated tenant pool.

aria-towers.name: Aria Towers
aria-towers.location: Westlands Corporate Hub, Nairobi. Mixed-use Grade-A.
opportunity: Westlands is Nairobi's primary corporate hub, hosting regional headquarters for the majority of multinational firms operating in East Africa. Grade-A vacancy remains below 6% with rental growth trending double digits.
Aria Towers combines premium office floors with serviced residences above — a counter-cyclical mix that has historically outperformed single-use assets across cycles.

crown-square.name: Crown Square
crown-square.location: Tatu City SEZ. Special Economic Zone Anchor.
opportunity: Tatu City is a licensed Special Economic Zone offering a 10% corporate tax rate, VAT exemptions, and accelerated permitting. Crown Square is the SEZ's flagship mixed-use precinct.

Investors benefit from the SEZ's structural tax shelter while gaining exposure to one of the fastest-growing satellite cities on the continent, anchored by global tenants relocating from the Nairobi CBD.

sgr-port-terminus-hub.name: SGR Port Terminus Hub
opportunity: Mombasa is the gateway port for East and Central Africa, with the Standard Gauge Railway terminus driving an inland container surge that has outstripped warehouse supply by a wide margin.
The Terminus Hub is a Grade-A logistics facility positioned for long-term net leases to global 3PL operators, with cashflows backed by hard-currency contracts.

oak.name: The Oak Residences
oak.location: Nairobi, Kenya. Premium Boutique Residential Development.
opportunity: The Oak Residences represents an exclusive collection of high-specification architectural units designed to meet the rising demand from executive tenants desiring low-density boutique layouts.

Positioned within a highly secure perimeter, the asset leverages cutting-edge smart home configurations and low-consumption utility infrastructure to ensure high net operating income margins for early equity partners.

amenities.name: Rooftop Infinity Pool
amenities.description: Panoramic views over the Nairobi skyline with an integrated sun deck.

amenities.name: Wellness Gym
amenities.description: State-of-the-art cardiovascular and strength training equipment.

amenities.name: Executive Lounge
amenities.description: Private meeting spaces and 24/7 concierge services for residents.

amenities.name: Full Power Backup
amenities.description: Dual synchronized generators ensuring 100% uninterrupted operations.

gemini-residency.name: Gemini Residency
gemini-residency.exit: Individual Unit Sale or Capital Refinance
opportunity: Gemini Residency Westlands is a modern off-plan residential development located in Brookside Grove, Westlands, Nairobi, offering luxury 1 and 2 bedroom apartments designed for both homeowners and investors. The sleek, futuristic tower features smart-home technology, premium European finishes, and breathtaking views.

The development boasts unmatched amenities including a heated rooftop infinity pool, private padel court, rooftop BBQ lounge, yoga studio, spa, fully equipped gym, on-site café, and a serene co-working space, driving high rental demand and strong capital appreciation.

renders.alt: Sleek futuristic exterior of Gemini Residency
Spacious open-plan living room with premium finishes
Luxurious modern bedroom with smart-home features

jabali.name: One Bedroom
jabali.location: Gateway Capital City. Located in a premium neighborhood undergoing major urban regeneration.
opportunity: Sustainable residential and commercial high-rise asset utilizing innovative clean-tech insulation and solar storage.
Modern open-plan layouts with quartz-topped prep islands and integrated high-velocity cooling.
Tier-1 construction developer with an exceptional portfolio track record.
Excellent yield potential driven by local urban regeneration plans.

renders.alt: Spacious living area with bespoke oak elements

grosvenor-residency.name: Grosvenor Residency
grosvenor-residency.tagline: Step into a life less ordinary
opportunity: Meticulously crafted 1- and 2-bedroom apartments in Westlands, Nairobi's most coveted neighborhood.
Flexible 3-year payment plan with only 20% deposit.
High-end finishes, intelligent layouts, and world-class amenities including dual heated pools and a padel court.
Significant cash discounts available with up to KES 3.9M discount for cash buyers.
